source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT 
A.LP_JobID AS JobID,
A.ContractID,
A.GrossAmount,
A.LP_JobStatusID,

CASE 
    WHEN E.FirstName   IS NULL     AND E.LastName     IS NOT NULL THEN E.LastName
    WHEN E.LastName    IS NULL     AND E.FirstName    IS NOT NULL THEN E.FirstName
    WHEN E.FirstName   IS NOT NULL AND E.LastName     IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(E.FirstName,' ',E.LastName)
    ELSE NULL END AS SalesRepName,

CASE 
    WHEN E1.FirstName   IS NULL     AND E1.LastName     IS NOT NULL THEN E1.LastName
    WHEN E1.LastName    IS NULL     AND E1.FirstName    IS NOT NULL THEN E1.FirstName
    WHEN E1.FirstName   IS NOT NULL AND E1.LastName     IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(E1.FirstName,' ',E1.LastName)
    ELSE NULL END AS InstallerName,
A.ContractDate,
B.ACtualDate  AS CompletionDate,
A.LP_ProductionBranchID AS BranchID,
BR.LongName 	AS BranchName,
BR.UNI_Market 	AS UnifiedMarket,
PR.LongDescription AS ProductName,
GETDATE() AS LastUpdatedTS
FROM EDW.FACT_JOB A
JOIN [EDW].[FACT_MILESTONE_DETAIL] B
ON A.JobID = B.JobID

LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_PRODUCT PR
ON A.ProductID = PR.ProductID

LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_EMPLOYEE E
ON A.SalesRep1_EmployeeID = E.EmployeeID
LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_EMPLOYEE E1
ON A.InstallerID_1 = E1.EmployeeID

LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_BRANCH BR
ON A.ProductionBranchID = BR.BranchID

WHERE B.LP_MilestoneDateTypeID ='C' 
AND B.ActualDate IS NOT NULL
AND A.Division='SWR'
AND B.ACtualDate >= '2025-01-01' 
AND B.ACtualDate <= GETDATE();

SELECT 
JobID,
ContractID,
New_JobStatusID,
Old_JobStatusID,
DateChanged,
CompletionDate,
EmployeeName,
SalesRepName,
InstallerName,
Old_GrossAmount,
New_GrossAmount,	
Helper_Gross,
BranchID,
BranchName,
UnifiedMarket,
DiscrepancyCount,
ProductName,
ContractDate,
LastUpdatedTS
FROM
(
	SELECT 
			LP_JObID AS JobID,
			ContractID,
			LP_New_JobStatusID AS New_JobStatusID,
			LP_Old_JobStatusID AS Old_JobStatusID,
			DateChanged,
			CompletionDate,
			EmployeeName,
			SalesRepName,
			InstallerName,
			Old_GrossAmount,
			New_GrossAmount,
			CASE WHEN RW=1 THEN New_GrossAmount ELSE 0 END AS Helper_Gross,
			BranchID,
			BranchName,
			UnifiedMarket,
			COUNT(1) OVER (PARTITION BY LP_JObID) AS DiscrepancyCount,
			GETDATE() AS LastUpdatedTS,
			ProductName,
			ContractDate
			FROM
			(
			
				SELECT 
					A.LP_JObID,
					B.ContractID,
					A.LP_New_JobStatusID,
					A.LP_Old_JobStatusID,
					A.DateChanged,
					MLD.ACtualDate AS CompletionDate,
				
				CASE 
					WHEN E1.FirstName   IS NULL     AND E1.LastName     IS NOT NULL THEN E1.LastName
					WHEN E1.LastName    IS NULL     AND E1.FirstName    IS NOT NULL THEN E1.FirstName
					WHEN E1.FirstName   IS NOT NULL AND E1.LastName     IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(E1.FirstName,' ',E1.LastName)
					ELSE NULL END AS InstallerName,
				
				CASE 
					WHEN E.FirstName   IS NULL     AND E.LastName     IS NOT NULL THEN E.LastName
					WHEN E.LastName    IS NULL     AND E.FirstName    IS NOT NULL THEN E.FirstName
					WHEN E.FirstName   IS NOT NULL AND E.LastName     IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(E.FirstName,' ',E.LastName)
					ELSE NULL END AS SalesRepName,
				
				CASE 
					WHEN E2.FirstName   IS NULL     AND E2.LastName     IS NOT NULL THEN E2.LastName
					WHEN E2.LastName    IS NULL     AND E2.FirstName    IS NOT NULL THEN E2.FirstName
					WHEN E2.FirstName   IS NOT NULL AND E2.LastName     IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(E2.FirstName,' ',E2.LastName)
					ELSE NULL END AS EmployeeName,
				
					A.Old_GrossAmount,
					A.New_GrossAmount,
					B.LP_ProductionBranchID 	AS BranchID,
					BR.LongName 	AS BranchName,
					BR.UNI_Market 	AS UnifiedMarket,
					ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY A.LP_JObID ORDER BY DateChanged DESC) AS RW,
					PR.LongDescription AS ProductName,
					B.ContractDate
					FROM [EDW].[FACT_JOB_STATUS_LOG] A
					JOIN EDW.FACT_JOB B
					ON A.JobID = B.JObID

					LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_PRODUCT PR
					ON B.ProductID = PR.ProductID

					JOIN [EDW].[FACT_MILESTONE_DETAIL] MLD
					ON B.JobID = MLD.JobID
					
					LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_BRANCH BR
					ON B.ProductionBranchID = BR.BranchID
					
					LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_EMPLOYEE E
					ON B.SalesRep1_EmployeeID = E.EmployeeID
					LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_EMPLOYEE E1
					ON B.InstallerID_1 = E1.EmployeeID
				
					LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_EMPLOYEE E2
					ON CONCAT(A.DIVISION,'-',A.LP_EmployeeID) = E2.EmployeeID
					
					WHERE A.DIVISION='SWR' 
					AND A.LP_New_JobStatusID IN ('J','K','PD','I','9','SP')
					AND MLD.LP_MilestoneDateTypeID ='C' 
					AND MLD.ACtualDate >= '2025-01-01' 
					AND MLD.ACtualDate <= GETDATE()
					AND MLD.ACtualDate IS NOT NULL
					) M1
					
			) M2;
